title: Spec: Add SOS authentication and rate limiting
description: Emergency/SOS section specifies 're-broadcast once (TTL-limited)' but no authentication. Attack vector: flood network with fake SOS messages causing DoS. Need: (1) require Ed25519 signature on SOS, (2) specify rate limiting (e.g., 1 SOS per node per hour), (3) define reputation/blacklist for SOS abusers.
close_reason: Already addressed in spec/12-apps.md Section 18.4.1. Covers: Ed25519/Schnorr signature required, rate limiting (10min cooldown, 3/hr max), soft blacklist with reputation tracking.
